text: | `tenex-edge-identity-routing` | The high-risk current identity model: durable ordinal identities, `AgentInstance`, base vs ordinal keys, agent-label routing, raw session IDs as internal-only handles, and removal of codenames. Source anchors: [src/identity.rs](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/src/identity.rs), [docs/wiki/guides/tenex-edge-agent-identity.md](/Users/pablofernandez/src/tenex-edge/docs/wiki/guides/tenex-edge-agent-identity.md), issues `#98` and `#99`. |
